🎓 WATER SECTOR COACH✕
Tap COACH after Red's turn for a read on the board, a suggested play, and the security lesson behind it.

CYBER REALM — WATER SECTOR EDITION

YOU ARE THE DEFENDER · SMALL WATER FACILITY vs SCRIPT KIDDIE

In this demo you play DEFENSE: you run a small water facility's blue team, defending the plant on the official mat against a Script Kiddie attacker (Red, played by the computer). Survive 20 turns with SCP ≥ 7. The Script Kiddie wins if SCP ever falls to 2 or below. Red's plays land in the kill-chain slots up top; yours land in the NIST framework and the water system.

Tap once to inspect, tap again to play. Gold glow = playable. Realm cards build your budget (one per turn, producing every turn) — if a Realm offers a choice of colors, you pick. Assets deploy to their water-system stage; Operators join the Blue Operator panel; heals pick a damaged Asset. Resources are committed, not consumed. Playing an Asset, Operator, or prepared Defense LOCKS one resource (🔒) for as long as that card is in play — it frees when the card leaves. One-shot cards (heals, draws, tools) dim a resource until your next turn. The counter shows FREE / IN USE / SPENT. Matching colors are committed first.

Any card you can pay for is playable. Defense cards played ahead of time become PREPARED (blue glow in their NIST slot) and trigger free when a matching Red attack comes in. Or hold them in hand and pay when Red attacks — your choice.

Combat: Operators with the amber ⚔ glow can attack — tap one. Red's unblocked Operators drain your SCP (max 4 each per turn). Assets never attack — they defend the water.

Hand limit 7: at end of your turn you'll discard down to 7 if over.
